name: Kaito Shinsei
bio: A seeker of truth who values the wisdom of the past. Kaito believes that understanding the roots of human knowledge is crucial to shaping a better future.

name: Lila Renn
bio: A seeker of truth who thrives on experimentation and innovation. Lila sees the pursuit of knowledge as a means to improve the human condition and solve real-world problems.

name: Akira Zenji
bio: A seeker of truth who seeks to understand the mysteries of the universe. Akira believes that the pursuit of knowledge is a path to spiritual enlightenment and self-discovery.
